name: Eagle Quest Golf
about: Eagle Quest Golf is an indoor digital golf training studio founded in 2018, offering year-round practice in a climate-controlled environment. The venue provides professional guidance from PGA professionals with access to virtual golf courses and personalized coaching sessions. Membership packages are available, focusing on skill development through tailored ball fitting, swing analysis, and on-site equipment, suitable for golfers of all levels looking to improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round indoor practice不受天气影响
State-of-the-art virtual golf system with detailed swing analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state whether club rentals are available, but personalized ball fitting is offered, suggesting members may use their own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided regarding outside food or drink policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific time for 18 holes is mentioned, but sessions are offered in 30, 60, and 90-minute increments.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly as it offers memberships and coaching suitable for players of all ages and abilities.
